/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libpnetcdf.so.8 -o libpnetcdf.so.8.0.0 CMakeFiles/pnetcdf.dir/src/comm/pnc_comm_commux.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/chengcli/pyenv/lib64/python3.11/site-packages/commux/lib:/home/chengcli/pyenv/lib64/python3.11/site-packages/torch/lib:/home/chengcli/scix/repos/pnetcdf/build-cmake: /home/chengcli/pyenv/lib64/python3.11/site-packages/commux/lib/libcommux.so /home/chengcli/pyenv/lib64/python3.11/site-packages/torch/lib/libtorch.so /home/chengcli/pyenv/lib64/python3.11/site-packages/torch/lib/libtorch_cpu.so /home/chengcli/pyenv/lib64/python3.11/site-packages/torch/lib/libc10.so libpnc.so.0.1.0
